message:
fix: wire ModelPicker into /model slash command

When /model is typed without arguments, show an interactive model picker
instead of a usage hint. The App intercepts the no-arg /model command,
renders ModelPicker in place of InputArea, and emits switch_model on
selection. handleSlashCommand now returns a result type to signal the
show_model_picker action.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
